entry_point.FQNAME: com.example.hopfog.NetworkManager java.lang.Object registerUser(android.content.Context context, java.lang.String username, java.lang.String email, java.lang.String password, kotlin.coroutines.Continuation<? super java.lang.Boolean> $completion)

problem.problem_class: Method always returns the same value

entry_point.FQNAME: com.example.hopfog.NetworkManager java.lang.Object runMessageCleanup(android.content.Context context, kotlin.coroutines.Continuation<? super java.lang.Boolean> $completion)

problem.problem_class: Method always returns the same value
